task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "安装必要库（pydub, librosa, matplotlib, numpy）"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载音频文件（使用pydub.AudioSegment.from_file）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "提取音频的基础信息（时长、采样率、声道数）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "将音频数据转换为numpy数组以进行分析"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "绘制音频波形图"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "绘制音频频谱图"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "检测削波现象（通过最大振幅值判断）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "计算音频的平均音量（RMS值）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "输出检测结果（削波、音量等）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "捕获异常并提示用户可能的解决方案"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "dependency"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "extractInfo"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "convertToNumpy"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "plotWaveform"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node6", "type": "plotSpectrogram"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node7", "type": "detectClipping"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node8", "type": "calculateRMS"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "outputResult"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "outputResult"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node10", "type": "handleError"}]}
